# Modules

Modules for the Tealium Android library.

## About markdown versions

All pages in this area are available in clean markdown format. To access the markdown version of any page, append `/index.md` to the page URL.

Example:
- HTML: `https://docs.tealium.com/iq-tag-management/getting-started/what-is-tealium-iq/`
- Markdown: `https://docs.tealium.com/iq-tag-management/getting-started/what-is-tealium-iq/index.md`


## Tealium API


- [Authentication](https://docs.tealium.com/api-v1/getting-started/auth/): This article describes the authentication methods used in Tealium V1 APIs.

- [Omnichannel File Status API Objects](https://docs.tealium.com/api-v1/omnichannel-file-status/data-objects/): The Omnichannel File Status API provides detailed status information for your Omnichannel files. The Omnichannel File Status API returns a File Status that details when the files imported, how they were processed, and any processing errors.

- [Request format](https://docs.tealium.com/api-v1/getting-started/request-format/): This article describes the request format for Tealium APIs.

- [Omnichannel File Status API endpoints](https://docs.tealium.com/api-v1/omnichannel-file-status/endpoints/): Use the File Import Status GET request to retreive detailed status information for your files.

- [About iQ Revisions](https://docs.tealium.com/api-v1/iq-revisions/about/): This article describes how to use the iQ Revisions API.

- [iQ Revisions objects](https://docs.tealium.com/api-v1/iq-revisions/data-objects/): Revisions are returned as JSON objects.

- [iQ Revisions API endpoints](https://docs.tealium.com/api-v1/iq-revisions/endpoints/): The GET iQ Revisions API uses JSON objects to retrieve revisions data.

- [About Hosted Data Layer API](https://docs.tealium.com/api-v1/hosted-data-layer/about/): The Hosted Data Layer API lets you upload and access data layer objects or JSON files on Tealium's servers.

- [Hosted Data Layer objects](https://docs.tealium.com/api-v1/hosted-data-layer/data-objects/): Create a data layer object or JSON file on Tealium's servers.

- [Hosted data layer API endpoints](https://docs.tealium.com/api-v1/hosted-data-layer/endpoints/): Manage your hosted data layer using a hosted data layer object or JSON file.



## Industries


- [The Identity Partner Ecosystem](https://docs.tealium.com/industries/tealium-identity-partners/about/): This article explains how the identity providers in Tealium’s Identity Partner Ecosystem work in the Tealium platform and how to use them.

- [netID Implementation Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/industries/tealium-identity-partners/netid-identity-resolution/): This article describes how to implement netID as a Tealium Identity Partner.

- [Using Tealium Functions for Acxiom Identity Resolution](https://docs.tealium.com/industries/tealium-identity-partners/acxiom-identity-resolution/): This article describes how to use a visitor function to retrieve probabalistic identity data from the Acxiom identity provider and save it in the visitor profile.

- [](): Updates The Visitor Privacy V2 API endpoint has been removed. If you were using the V2 API, you need to upgrade to the Visitor Privacy V3 API.

- [1.0.0]():  Initial release 

- [1.0.1]():  Updates to our NuGet packaging. Due to changes in the packaging format, users on version 1.0.0 may experience issues. 

- [1.1.0]():  Added .NET9 support Updated to latest Tealium SDK versions: iOS Swift v2.16.x and Android Kotlin v1.7.3 Updated Xamarin.Kotlin.StdLib dependency …

- [1.2.0]():  Update Tealium dependencies: iOS Swift v2.18.x and Android Kotlin v1.9.1. Use XCFrameworks instead of Fat Frameworks for the iOS bindings. 

- [1.2.4]():  Fixed issues for iOS that were causing compilation errors on some ARM machines if ForceSimulatorX64ArchitectureInIDE is false.

- [Version 5.6.0](): High Impact Changes
Removed the UIWebView entirely to now only support WKWebView as Apple has deprecated UIWebView since iOS 8.0. We kept the support …

- [Version 5.6.5](): Low Impact Changes
Added the tealium_session_id the volatile data variables so is easily retrieved and used. 

- [Version 5.6.6](): Low Impact Changes
Bug Fix. Update log format on removeRemoteCommandID.

- [Version 5.9.5]():  Fixed to avoid possible crashes when trying to open a deep link with unescaped query parameters. 

- [Version 5.9.6]():  Gradle updates, and Android compileSdkVersion and targetSdkVersion increased to version 33 for all modules.
